content.en:
Battle Ancestral Realm.

Ye Tian's copy body has come here, please see Zhan Zu.

Soon, Ye Tian saw Zhan Zu,

"Zhan Zu, I want to guard the edge of the Dark Forbidden Realm and resist the Silent Annihilation Clan!"

Ye Tian said his purpose.

"You want to take the initiative to resist the Silent Annihilation?"

Zhan Zu was extremely shocked.

He knew how terrifying the Silent Annihilation was, even he was unwilling to resist the Silent Annihilation, but he had to resist.

Otherwise, the Silent Annihilation Clan will invade the Dark Sanctuary sooner or later, and at that time, even the Dark Sanctuary will not be able to stop the invasion of the Annihilation Clan.

Moreover, as the area occupied by the Silent Extinction grows larger, so will their number.

Therefore, the Silencers must be stopped.

However, no one was willing to take the initiative to resist the Silent Annihilation Clan, it was all a helpless move.

And the Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestor Ye Tian is a new Peerless Domain Ancestor, and he has a long time without having to resist the Silent Annihilation Clan.

"Zhan Zu, I really want to resist the Silent Annihilation Clan, this body is my special clone, it is no different from the main body, even if I die in battle, I will not really fall!"

Ye Tiandao.

"If you don't say it, I really think it's your essence. Perhaps, since you want to go, then go, just in time to replace a peerless domain ancestor of the Battle Gate!"

Zhan Zu Dao.

Subsequently, Zhan Zu told Ye Tian a lot of things about the Silent Annihilation Clan.

First of all, the Dark Sanctuary and the Dark Destruction Domain respectively established two continents in the place where they resisted the Silent Annihilation Clan, one was the Sanctuary Continent and the other was the Destruction Continent, and the Ancestors and the Superior Domain Ancestors lived on the two continents, resisting the Silent Annihilation Clan all the time.

The place where the Silent Annihilation Clan is located is too far away from the Dark Sanctuary, and if you want to fly over it with the strength of a superior domain ancestor, you don't know how many realm epochs you can fly to reach, it will be an unimaginable number.

Therefore, only the Ancestors could send the Ancestors of the Superior Domain to the past.

"Wanfa War Ancestor, you are ready, I will send you to the Holy Domain Continent!"

Zhan Zu Dao.

The unsurpassed domain ancestors of the battle gate all like to be named after a certain war ancestor, so Ye Tian broke through to the unsurpassed domain ancestor, which is called the Ten Thousand Law War Ancestor.

If Ye Tiantian really reached the Ancestor level in the future, in order to avoid the same name as the War Ancestor, he could go to another Ancestor name.

"Good!"

Ye Tianying said.

Rumble!!!!

A powerful force enveloped Ye Tian through time and space, and came to the origin of time and space in the Dark Forbidden Domain, spanning an endless distance in an instant.

And this teleportation took a full day, and Ye Tiancai arrived at the Sacred Domain Continent.

At this time.

The connection between Ye Tian's copy body and the body is very weak, the distance is too far, even if the information transmission between the two sides is concerned, I am afraid it will take thousands of years.

"No, the environment here ......"

Ye Tian sensed the surroundings, the space pressure here was very huge, and the time was very chaotic, if there was no higher-level domain ancestor's thinking, I am afraid that the consciousness would be wiped out by the power of time and space here.

Moreover, it is difficult for his power to be exerted.

"I'm afraid I won't be able to show much of my strength here!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Rumble!!!!

A peerless domain ancestor appeared in front of Ye Tian, a peerless domain ancestor that Ye Tian didn't know.

"You're the Ten Thousand Law War Ancestor, right?"

The visitor asked.

"You are the Blood Dragon Battle Ancestor!"

Ye Tiandao.

He hadn't seen the Blood Dragon Battle Ancestor, but he had discovered the name of the Blood Dragon War Ancestor by copying his talent, so he knew the identity of the Blood Dragon War Ancestor.

The Blood Dragon War Ancestor is also one of the unsurpassed War Ancestors of the Battle Gate, and also one of the deputy masters of the Battle Gate.

However, this so-called deputy door master is actually just a name for the outside world, and among the battle gates, there is no deputy door master among the ancestors of the superior domain.

"It's me, Zhan Zu informed me that you are here, and by the way, I will introduce you to the situation and precautions in the Sanctuary Continent, these things are more complicated, Zhan Zu didn't have the time to explain them to you one by one, so let me be your guide!"

Blood Dragon Battle Ancestor Dao.

Subsequently, the Blood Dragon Battle Ancestor took Ye Tian to a mansion.

"Wanfa Zhan Ancestor, you will live here in the future!"

Blood Dragon Battle Ancestor Dao.

Then, the two sat down, and the Blood Dragon Battle Ancestor explained the situation here to Ye Tian.

"Wanfa War Ancestor, the depths of the space-time in front of our Sanctuary Continent are the space-time corridors, and the other end of the space-time corridor is the territory of the Silent Annihilation Clan, their power is invading our space-time, our goal is to resist them, otherwise the location of the space-time corridor will keep moving, and the larger their territory will be. In addition, this place is different from the Dark Sanctuary, you should also feel that your own power cannot be exerted, this is a normal situation, everyone is like this!"

"There is no forbidden power here, and there is no other power, only the extinguishing energy of the Silent Annihilators. Strictly speaking, the Silence Annihilation Energy of the Silence Annihilation Clan fills this time and space, but it is a pity that it is difficult for us to refine the energy of the Silence Annihilation Clan, and only the ancestors have the ability to refine the energy of the Silence Annihilation Clan. Therefore, once we fight here, it will be difficult to replenish energy if the power consumption is too great. Therefore, once the energy resources on our bodies are consumed, we need to exchange energy resources from the ancestors. "

"Moreover, this piece of time and space will also give birth to many rare treasures, and even some chances, there was once a peerless domain ancestor who got the opportunity in this time and space, and was finally promoted to the first ancestor. In addition, there are many forbidden creature races on the Sanctuary Continent, and they are all Superior Domain Ancestors, almost all of them are under the leadership of the Forbidden Holy Gate. "

"The Silent Annihilation Clan will launch a small attack almost every tens of thousands of years, we try to find the weak Silent Annihilation Clan, don't look for those powerful Silent Annihilation Clan, otherwise we don't know how to die!"

"The strength of the Silent Annihilation Clan is very easy to judge, you only need to look at the gray stripes on their bodies, a gray stripe, that is, a Silent Annihilation Clan, the strength is equivalent to the average Peerless Domain Clan, and then the Second Pattern Silence Annihilation Clan, the Third Pattern Silent Annihilation Clan, once it reaches the Five-Pattern Silent Annihilation Clan, it is comparable to a half-step ancestor. If it is the Seven Patterns Silent Annihilation Ancestor, then it is the Ancestor combat power, and the most powerful is the Nine Patterns Silent Annihilation Ancestor, only one has been found so far, but it requires the strongest ancestor of our Dark Sanctuary Domain to join forces with the strongest ancestor of the Dark Destruction Domain to barely compete. "

The Blood Dragon Battle Ancestor said a lot of things, and Ye Tian wrote them down one by one.
